content: I m just download game for first time dont have account yet and keep stucking in "checking for resource updates" like 30min nothing happend so I try to redownload to game ,use vpn I restart my pc but it doesnt work what is the solution? (fix button is not responding)

Ever since the the ghelot event, the game has been unplayable due to one single issue.

The login screen does not load its ui on a linux device

Will this ever be fixed? I am unable to pay due to region restrictions and I cant open the steam version on steam deck.

Please give me a way to buy things in this game.
thread_title: Will there be a login screen fix for linux any time soon?
